intro.title: A Complete Guide to Form Entries
subtitleVariants: Every submission lands in one organized place.
Find, review, and act on entries without the spreadsheet detour.
Manage every form response from one mission control.

outro.title: Stay on top of every response
subtitleVariants: Search, filter, and act on entries without leaving WordPress.
Every submission stays organized and easy to manage.
Build smarter forms — and never lose a response again.
